description: An impressionistic painting of the Porte Saint-Martin in Paris, showing the monumental triumphal arch along a busy boulevard. Horse-drawn carriages and pedestrians populate the street. Trees with autumn foliage line the avenue. Haussmann-era buildings flank both sides. The scene is painted with quick, fluid brushstrokes capturing the atmosphere and movement of Parisian street life, characteristic of Antoine Blanchard's iconic views of Paris. No biblical or religious content is present.
